results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Threshold re-check: earthquake toll rose to 4,333 (Jul 11) but growth is disaster-attributed caseload (natural), not a NEW discrete own-conduct failure. No dated evidence of aid diversion or responder-access denial crossing -5pt. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban toll rose to ~125 militants (Jul 14), but casualties are overwhelmingly armed militants; counterinsurgency over an already-priced Balochistan pattern with no dated new mass-civilian-harm event by state forces. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Continued civilian casualties in southern Lebanon are EXTERNALLY-INFLICTED (Israeli strikes), attributed to Israel not Lebanon. Lebanese own-conduct unchanged. No scoreable own-conduct move. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Attribution split: own-conduct executions/repression (784+ YTD) already price the 2.5 near-floor; US blockade/strikes and Iran's cross-border retaliation on US bases (Kuwait/Bahrain/Jordan) are interstate/US-attributable, logged for digest not scored. Near-floor arithmetic forecloses a >=5pt move. CONFIRM 2.5 + watch.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: UN Fact-Finding Mission (Jul 8-9) formally finds El Fasher atrocities constitute genocide markers; HRC launches El Obeid inquiry. Own-conduct/internal-actor harm. 0.0 floor sustained and substantively reinforced.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola deaths crossed 719 (Jul 13), fastest-growing outbreak on record — but epidemic caseload is disease-attributed, not a discrete new own-conduct failure. Chronic response weakness already priced at near-floor. CONFIRM 2.3.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Gaza ceasefire violations continue (~dozen killed Jul 13-15 incl. six police in Jabaliya); MoH attributes 1,108 killed since Oct 2025 truce. Own-conduct strikes. Sustained, freshly-dated 0.0 floor confirmation.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Hodeidah fighting (Jul 4: 66 killed), Sanaa airport struck Jul 13, 73 UN staff still detained by Houthi authorities while >half the population is acutely hungry. Internal-actor aid obstruction sustains the 0.0 floor.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: UN records 293 Ukrainian civilians killed / 1,990 injured in June (new monthly record), ~170/day in July, driven by Russian long-range strikes on urban areas. Realized own-conduct harm sustains the 0.0 floor.

results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: Determination: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. The 15.0 baseline (applied 2026-07-05) already priced the term-limit amendment, Cristosal's forced exile, 140+ fleeing, and Ruth Lopez's arrest. July 2026 evidence codifies/continues the same own-conduct pattern; not a discrete new >=5pt move (deep-Critical, weaknessFactor 0). CONFIRM 15.0 + strong downward watch. ACC/INT freshly corroborated at low values.

results.name: Eritrea
results.key_finding: FIRST individual assessment (was last_assessed:null bulk placeholder). Evidence-based first baseline lands ON the existing 0.0 floor: ongoing UN-documented crimes against humanity (indefinite conscription as enslavement, enforced disappearance), RSF 180/180 press freedom for 3rd year running, no elections since 1993. Interstate Ethiopia-Eritrea war RISK explicitly NOT scored (risk, not realized; interstate) — logged for digest. CONFIRM 0.0; placeholder converted to evidence-based floor.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: $1.4T youth-safety penalty figure (Jul 7 filing) is a plaintiffs' DEMAND, not an adjudicated finding; underlying conduct already priced into deep-Critical 7.8 (ACC at floor). Aug 18 Oakland trial is the scoreable future trigger. Low arithmetic + no new adjudicated finding foreclose a move. CONFIRM 7.8 + watch trial.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Jul 8 mass sentencing of 21 opposition figures (Ghannouchi 14 yrs in absentia) SUSTAINS the basis for the 34.4->23.8 downgrade already APPLIED 2026-07-14. Same-conduct corroboration, not a new escalation; re-proposing would double-count. CONFIRM 23.8.

results.name: Cuba
results.key_finding: Third grid collapse in nine days (Jul 14); proximate driver is the EXTERNALLY-attributed US oil blockade compounding internal infrastructure decay — not a discrete new own-conduct atrocity. Scattered Havana protests but no dated mass-repression event within window. Own-conduct repression already priced (ACC/INT 1.5). Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 32.8.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Amended deepfake-CSAM complaint (Jul 7) adds two victim-plaintiffs, Stability AI as co-defendant, and a systemic NCMEC-reporting-failure allegation (90% of reports non-actionable). New dated own-product conduct reinforces but cannot lower the existing 0.0 harm-floor. CONFIRM 0.0.

special_attention_determinations.eritrea: FIRST individual assessment (was bulk placeholder, last_assessed:null). Evidence-based first baseline lands on existing 0.0 floor — ongoing crimes against humanity (enslavement via indefinite conscription, enforced disappearance), RSF last-place press freedom 3 years running, no elections since 1993. Interstate war-risk NOT scored (risk + interstate). CONFIRM 0.0; placeholder now evidence-based. No proposal (no dimension change).
special_attention_determinations.el_salvador: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. 15.0 (applied 2026-07-05) already priced the term-limit amendment + Cristosal exile + 140 defenders fleeing + Ruth Lopez arrest per APPLIED_CHANGES. July 2026 evidence is same-conduct codification/continuation, not a discrete new >=5pt move (deep-Critical, all dims <4 -> weaknessFactor 0). CONFIRM 15.0 + strong downward watch. No proposal.
special_attention_determinations.iran: Attribution split — own-conduct executions/repression (784+ YTD) price the 2.5 near-floor; US blockade/strikes and Iran's retaliation on US bases are interstate/US-attributable, logged for digest, not scored. Near-floor forecloses >=5pt. CONFIRM 2.5 + watch.
special_attention_determinations.sudan: 0.0 floor sustained and reinforced by UN genocide-markers finding + El Obeid inquiry.
special_attention_determinations.tunisia: Jul 8 mass sentencing sustains the already-applied 23.8 downgrade; confirmed, not re-proposed (double-count guard).
special_attention_determinations.meta: $1.4T is a penalty demand not an adjudication; already-priced conduct + low arithmetic foreclose a move. CONFIRM 7.8, watch Aug 18 trial.
special_attention_determinations.xai_grok: Amended CSAM complaint reinforces already-priced litigation; floor forecloses move. CONFIRM 0.0.
special_attention_determinations.venezuela: Earthquake caseload is disaster-attributed; own-conduct response-failure stays sub-threshold. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.
special_attention_determinations.drc: Ebola 719 deaths is disease-attributed; near-floor confirm. CONFIRM 2.3.

us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: Iran/Strait of Hormuz crisis: US reimposed naval blockade of Iranian ports (Jul 14) and launched further strike waves to degrade Iranian shipping-attack capability; Iran retaliated on US bases in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan. Interstate/US-attributable — logged for digest, not attributed to Iran's compassion score.
Cuba energy crisis: US oil blockade (imposed after 2026 US intervention in Venezuela) is the proximate external driver of Cuba's grid collapses — externally-attributed compounding factor.
Eritrea: sharply elevated Ethiopia-Eritrea interstate war RISK over Red Sea port access (driven substantially by Ethiopian PM Abiy) — risk not realized, interstate, NOT scored against Eritrea.
notes: 15 priority entities assessed; 15 confirmations, 0 new change proposals; queue remains clear. Human-approval gate respected — no index JSON modified, score-updater not run. No dimensions changed for any entity, so no subdim sidecars written this cycle. Two pre-existing rotation-state rank drifts corrected to published index values (eritrea 188->184, cuba 112). Dominant pattern: floor/near-floor entities where arithmetic forecloses moves, plus correct attribution of externally-inflicted or interstate harm away from entity own-conduct scores.
